scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Work Form Home-Job Work Yojana
page_title: Mukhyamantri Work Form Home-Job Work Yojana

details: Rajasthan government has launched 26-08-2022 a new scheme for women, the Mukhyamantri Work From–Job Work Scheme Under the Women and Child Development Department, Rajasthan who can contribute to the family income while working from home. Now women of the state will be able to get employment sitting at home through this scheme. Many women cannot go out and work, the government wants to help them by giving them work at home so that they can work at home and earn money to support their families financially.

During work from home, women will be made to work from home through various departments like the Women Empowerment Department, School and Higher and Technical Education, Works Department, and Information Technology and Communication Department, and this will include typing, documentation, dictation, etc. Instructions will be issued keeping this in mind.
School and higher and technical education

Through school and higher and technical education, women students will be allowed to study online and some women will be given the work of stitching dresses to be given to the students in the school. Along with this, women can do the work of washing clothes, bedsheets, etc. used in school while sitting at home.
Department of Information Technology and Communication

In this department, women will be given work related to programming like software design, data analysis, and web design. Due to this women will be friends with modern methods and through this, they will also be able to earn a good income.

Important instructions will be issued to women in the financial department to get the work related to accounting and auditing done in government agencies by the women of the state through work from home.
Under this work, counseling services will be provided to women in the form of work from home.
Medical Health and Family Welfare Department-
Online consultation service from women specialist doctors, transcription, sewing work of clothes used in hospitals.
Department of Skills, Employment and Entrepreneurship -

Organize employment fairs/ camps and ensure participation of such employers who provide employment opportunities in the form of work-from-home-job work. To provide work from home job work to the women registered under the scheme through these fairs/camps.
Rajasthan Skills and Livelihood Development Corporation (RSLDC) -

To connect at least 10 percent of the women trained under the training being conducted by Rajasthan Skills and Livelihood Development Corporation through training partners with work from home-job work.
To provide work from home- job work opportunities to women in work related to the processing and marketing of milk and milk products.
benefits: Advertisement of such private unit which provides work from home-job work to a maximum number of women will be displayed free of cost on the Work from Home-Job Work portal.

If a private unit provides work from home - job work to women and the payment for the work given to the woman is more than ₹ 5,000, then ₹ 3,000 per trainee will be given as a training incentive, as a training fee. However, the payment of the training incentive amount will be given to the female trainee only after the offer letter is given by the private entity in the form of work from home- job work.
eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Rajasthan.
The minimum age of the applicant should be 18 years.
Preference will be given to widow/abandoned/divorced/disabled/victim of violence.

online: Mukhyamantri Work From Home –Job Work Yojna
Click on Applicant (only female) under "Onboarding" option.
Register as a “ Woman Applicant ” through “ Jan-Aadhaar Number ” and “ Aadhaar Number ”
All details of Applicant are fetched from Jan-Aadhaar Number & Aadhaar Number.
Click on the “ Submit ” button & Registration is complete And intimation is sent to the applicant through SMS.
Applicant can view/ search Opportunity and Apply.
Organization check applicant details and Verify Documents.
Intimation sent to Applicant through SMS.

documents_required: Special Category (Disabled/Divorced/Specially Handicapped/Victim of Violence) Documents

faqs.question: What is the Mukhyamantri Work from Home - Job Work Yojana?
faqs.answer: The Mukhyamantri Work from Home - Job Work Yojana is a government initiative aimed at providing work-from-home opportunities to individuals seeking employment or supplemental income.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of “Mukhyamantri Work from Home-Job Work Scheme”?
faqs.answer: With this scheme, women of the state will become empowered and self-reliant. Rajasthan Work from Home Scheme will also reduce the unemployment rate. Apart from this, women will also be able to get employment under this scheme. Various training programs will also be organized for this.

faqs.question: Is there any Preference that will be given in this scheme?
faqs.answer: Preference will be given to widow/abandoned/divorced/disabled/victim of violence.

faqs.question: Is there any age criteria ?
faqs.answer: The minimum age of the applicant should be 18 years.

faqs.question: Can I apply offline for the scholarship?
faqs.answer: No, you can apply online only.

faqs.question: What is DBT?
faqs.answer: DBT stands for Direct Benefit Transfer. It is a system introduced by the Government of India to transfer subsidies directly to the beneficiaries' bank accounts.

faqs.question: Can applicants from outside Rajasthan apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: No, this scheme is only for Rajasthan state.

faqs.question: What is IFSC code?
faqs.answer: The IFSC code, or Indian Financial System Code, is an alphanumeric code used to identify specific bank branches within the electronic payment system in India.

faqs.question: What is Jan Aadhaar Number?
faqs.answer: Database of demographic and socio-economic information of the resident families of the state and through the Jan Aadhaar card, the identity of the family and its members. And to provide recognition as an address document.
